decisions.rationale: The observation's base_record_id 'project_nostrand-rogers-sbs' already exists as a canonical registry record with matching payload (same project_name 'Nostrand Ave / Rogers Ave Select Bus Service', same project_type 'Select Bus Service', same borough 'Brooklyn', same description about converting B44 Limited to SBS on 9.3-mile corridor from Williamsburg Bridge to Sheepshead Bay). Per canonicalization rules, when the closest match IS the observation's own base_record_id, the decision is 'new' — the observation already resolves to that id.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Nostrand Ave / Rogers Ave Select Bus Service Community Board 15
9.3 miles from Williamsburg Bridge to Sheepshead Bay
B44 Limited will become SBS; B44 Local will continue as before

proposed_relations.description: Both records describe the identical Nostrand Ave/Rogers Ave SBS project: 9.3 miles from Williamsburg Bridge to Sheepshead Bay, converting B44 Limited to SBS. CB15 and CB3 presentations from May 2010 share identical project features.

proposed_relations.description: The Nostrand/Rogers SBS proposal (2010, Phase I BRT corridor) is the planning-phase predecessor of the B44 SBS implementation (completed November 2013), which is described as the 'Fifth and final Phase I SBS route'.

evidence_refs.source_quote: This map illustrates the Phase I BRT Corridors in New York City and its surrounding regions. The map is color-coded to show different types of projects: blue lines represent 'Implemented SBS Projects', and red lines represent 'Phase I SBS Projects'.
